"C:\Program Files\JetBrains\CLion 2019.3.3\bin\cmake\win\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\SentimentAnalyzer.dir/objects.a
C:\PROGRA~1\mingw64\bin\ar.exe cr CMakeFiles\SentimentAnalyzer.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\SentimentAnalyzer.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\PROGRA~1\mingw64\bin\G__~1.EXE -g   -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\SentimentAnalyzer.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive  -o SentimentAnalyzer.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libSentimentAnalyzer.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\SentimentAnalyzer.dir\linklibs.rsp
